title: alyssum calycinum var. erraticum
intro: Alyssum calycinum var. erraticum, also known as erratic alyssum, is a perennial plant in the mustard family that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Alyssum calycinum var. erraticum is also valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in herbal infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
